calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Vacating And Setting Aside Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-17-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. HOWARD A. SIMON, ESQ. of HR and Employment Law Solutions, Tel No. 650-533-4076 appearing for the Plaintiffs;
Defendant ERICA SHAFIR, Tel No. 415-500-1236 appearing telephonically in pro per;
Out-of-state attorney MICHAEL SHAFIR, ESQ. appearing telephonically.

RULING - The Court indicates that it cannot hear argument from attorney Michael Shafir as he has not been admitted to the California State Bar pro hac vice. Matter argued and submitted by parties. The Court vacates its tentative ruling, and orders as follows: DEFENDANT ERICA SHAFIR'S Motion For Order Vacating And Setting Aside Default And Default Judgment is denied. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-17-2015 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Default And Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-09-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Howard Allan Simon, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, MACKENZIE & PARTNERS, INC., dba TRUEX METIER, JOHN CULLENS and MARY ANN TRUEX.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) ERICA SHAFIR.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

Plaintiffs John Cullens and Mary Ann Truex sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $51,686.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $575.35
Total Judgment in the amount of $52,261.35
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-28-2015 Set For Trial On Aug-17-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
